    46→map("n", "<leader>tv", function()

file.content:
require "nvchad.mappings"

-- add yours here

local map = vim.keymap.set

map("n", ";", ":", { desc = "CMD enter command mode" })
map("i", "jk", "<ESC>")

-- map({ "n", "i", "v" }, "<C-s>", "<cmd> w <cr>")
vim.api.nvim_del_keymap('n', '<leader>cm')
map("n", "<leader>gm", "<cmd>Telescope git_commits<CR>", { desc = "telescope git commits" })

-- vim.api.nvim_del_keymap('th', '<leader>cm')
-- vim.api.nvim_del_keymap('pt', '<leader>cm')
map("n", "<leader>tH", "<cmd>Telescope terms<CR>", { desc = "telescope pick hidden term" })
map("n", "<leader>zt", "<cmd>Telescope themes<CR>", { desc = "telescope nvchad themes" })
map("n", "<leader>zc", "<cmd>NvCheatsheet<CR>", { desc = "toggle nvcheatsheet" })
vim.api.nvim_del_keymap("n", '<leader>pt')
vim.api.nvim_del_keymap("n", '<leader>ch')

map("n", "<leader>r", "<cmd>set rnu!<CR>", { desc = "toggle relative number" })
vim.api.nvim_del_keymap("n", '<leader>rn')

vim.api.nvim_del_keymap("n", '<leader>ma')
map("n", "<leader>aa", "<cmd>Telescope marks<CR>", { desc = "telescope find marks" })


-- whichkey
vim.api.nvim_del_keymap("n", '<leader>wK')
map("n", "<leader>K", "<cmd>WhichKey <CR>", { desc = "whichkey all keymaps" })

vim.api.nvim_del_keymap("n", '<leader>wk')
map("n", "<leader>k", function()
  vim.cmd("WhichKey " .. vim.fn.input "WhichKey: ")
end, { desc = "whichkey query lookup" })


-- new terminals
vim.api.nvim_del_keymap("n", '<leader>h')
map("n", "<leader>th", function()
  require("nvchad.term").new { pos = "sp" }
end, { desc = "terminal new horizontal term" })

vim.api.nvim_del_keymap("n", '<leader>v')
map("n", "<leader>tv", function()
  require("nvchad.term").new { pos = "vsp" }
end, { desc = "terminal new vertical window" })

1→-- This file  needs to have same structure as nvconfig.lua 
     2→-- https://github.com/NvChad/NvChad/blob/v2.5/lua/nvconfig.lua
     3→
     4→---@type ChadrcConfig
     5→local M = {}
     6→
     7→M.base46 = {
     8→	theme = "everforest",
     9→	transparancy = true,
    10→	theme_toggle = { "monekai", "everforest" },
    11→  integration = { "neogit", "lazygit", "diffview" },
    12→}
    13→
    14→return M
    15→

file.content:
-- This file  needs to have same structure as nvconfig.lua 
-- https://github.com/NvChad/NvChad/blob/v2.5/lua/nvconfig.lua

---@type ChadrcConfig
local M = {}

M.base46 = {
	theme = "everforest",
	transparancy = true,
	theme_toggle = { "monekai", "everforest" },
  integration = { "neogit", "lazygit", "diffview" },
}

return M

content.text: Let me check for an existing keymap file.

Now I have everything I need. Here's what I'll set up based on your nvim config:

- **LSPs**: TypeScript, HTML, CSS, Tailwind CSS (with ERB/eruby support), Solargraph (Ruby), clangd (C)
- **Formatters**: prettier (JS/CSS/HTML), stylua (Lua), yamlfmt (YAML), sql-formatter (SQL), erb_format (ERB)
- **Vim mode** with `jk` → ESC, relative line numbers
- **Theme**: Everforest (matching your nvim theme)

content.content: The file /home/tymoyato/.config/zed/settings.json has been updated successfully.

content.text:
Done. A couple of notes:

**Theme**: Install the **Everforest** extension from the Zed extension marketplace (`zed: extensions` in command palette) — it's not built-in.

**LSPs**: Zed auto-installs most LSPs. `sqls` and `solargraph` need to be installed manually (`gem install solargraph`, `go install github.com/sqls-server/sqls@latest`).

**`jk` → ESC**: Mapped in `keymap.json` for vim insert mode.

**Format on save** is enabled — comment out `"format_on_save": "on"` if you want to keep it manual (your nvim had it commented out too).
